name: product-description
description: Write a persuasive ecommerce product description that highlights features as benefits, speaks to buyer emotions, and drives add-to-cart action.
input_description: Product name, category, key features, target buyer, price point, and any unique selling points or brand voice notes.
output_description: Product description with a hook headline, benefit-led paragraph copy, a features/specs bullet list, a 'Who it's for' section, and a closing CTA phrase.
